code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or safety hazards
    - Complete failure/defects with warnings against purchase
    - Multiple unresolved issues overriding any positives →1
    - Returns/refund requests with safety concerns →1
    - Updates mentioning unresolved critical failures →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional with critical flaws affecting regular use
    - Requires significant workarounds negating core value →2
    - Short lifespan despite proper care/maintenance →2
    - Partial functionality (some sizes/parts failed immediately) →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons without clear dominance
    - Temporary solutions needing imminent replacement →3
    - "Adequate but..." statements with explicit compromises →3
    - Satisfied with major reservations about durability →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Clear recommendation with SPECIFIC usage constraints
    - Material tradeoffs requiring special handling (thinness/fading) →4
    - Requires behavior modifications (portion control, careful use) →4
    - Praise focuses on aesthetics/color with functional compromises →4
    - Continued use of alternatives for specific tasks →4
    - NEW: Mixing complementary products to overcome limitations →4
    - NEW: Explicit boundaries like "Great for X but use Y for Z" →4
    - Transformative aesthetic impact overshadowed by material issues →4
    - Requires strict adherence to usage guidelines for satisfaction →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unqualified endorsement despite inherent characteristics
    - Long-term validation through sustained daily use →5
    - Transforms user experience through core functionality →5
    - Inherent limitations accepted as product essence →5
    - Emotional language ("love", "perfect") outweighing neutral observations →5
    - NEW: Cons inherent to design/material don't affect recommendation →5
    - NEW: Overcoming learning curve with sustained excellent results →5
    - Direct competitor comparisons with clear preference →5

    EDGE CASE CLARIFICATIONS:
    - Precautions modifying normal use →4 | Optimization tips enhancing use →5
    - Core functionality compromised →4 | Core excellence with secondary limitations →5
    - "Great for X but use Y for Z" →4 | "No alternatives needed for intended use" →5
    - Material compromises affecting function →4 | Material authenticity accepted →5
</DynamicRules>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (Gold 4):
Review: "Love these snack bags! Perfect size if you don't overfill. Still use Ziplocs for messy foods."
Rating: 4

Example 2 (Gold 5):
Review: "EDIT: After 18 months daily use, still works perfectly despite minor noise. Best purchase!"
Rating: 5

Example 3 (Gold 4):
Review: "Vibrant blue transforms my kitchen! Fabric is thinner than photos but I love the look."
Rating: 4

Example 4 (Gold 5):
Review: "Cotton wrinkles as expected but creates perfect table settings. Washes beautifully!"
Rating: 5

Example 5 (Gold 4):
Review: "Glass lids chip if stacked carelessly, but perfect visibility for pantry items."
Rating: 4

Example 6 (Gold 5):
Review: "Not quite Lodge but my daily driver for 2 years - outperforms newer models!"
Rating: 5

Example 7 (Gold 4):
Review: "Collapsible bins great for seasonal storage - reinforce corners for heavy items."
Rating: 4

Example 8 (Gold 5):
Review: "Ceramic knife stays sharp but can't chop bones - exactly as expected. My favorite tool!"
Rating: 5

Example 9 (Gold 4):
Review: "Ideal for dry storage if you avoid microwaving. Use plastic containers for reheating."
Rating: 4

Example 10 (Gold 5):
Review: "Learning curve pays off - makes best espresso I've ever had! Worth every penny."
Rating: 5

Example 11 (Gold 4):
Review: "The shade of blue pops! Material thinner than expected but transforms room decor."
Rating: 4

Example 12 (Gold 5):
Review: "Sharp tablecloth needs ironing - that's cotton! Colors stay vibrant wash after wash."
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (24 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 11
  gold 5 -> 4: 6
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 3 -> 2: 1
  gold 2 -> 1: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [4, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "These mats are fine if you like to switch them out a lot. If you refer to have a very fresh and new bathmat for the bathroom when guests are staying for a visit, then these have a fun knobbly like texture to them and are cheap enough to pick up for s..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 3, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "Grunds bathmat is 100% certified organic cotton  with the main section being long straight cotton fibers and it has three stripes of loops on each end. This fiber is not treated with bleach, formaldehyde,  or any other harmful toxic substances. This ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [4, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "Had these for one day. While the medium size one was able to save a piece of fruit without a problem the larger one broke the same day I got it when I tried using it to keep a summer sausage fresh as shown in the picture. Wouldn't recommend nor would..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 1, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "This is a coffee pot for coffee geeks.  Most discerning coffee aficionados likely wouldn't notice much if any difference from a a great less complicated coffee make, such as a Bonavita.  To cut to the point, this probably isn't for you, but who knows..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "Trolling the various online coffee blogs and review sites (especially those focusing on espresso) I found mostly negative reviews of this decent little grinder, and were it not for the $30 price I paid at a wholesale club, I likely would have taken t..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 24 errors, 14 borderline out of 54 examples."}
